titleEn: AI Daily |  Retrieval, multimodal, and memory systems, Retrieval, multimodal, and memory systems, Agents and developer tooling

excerptEn: This issue is really about two lines accelerating at once: Retrieval, multimodal, and memory systems, and Agents and developer tooling. Simon Willison, Hugging Face…

titleZh: 万物皆能量：从热力学到个人成长的底层法则
titleEn: The Physics of Success: Why Everything Comes Down to Energy and Order
excerptZh: 宇宙的底层法则是熵增，但人类文明是一台逆熵机器——从个人到组织到AI，同一套能量-秩序法则在不同尺度上运行。这不是鸡汤，这是热力学。
excerptEn: The universe trends toward chaos. You trend toward order. From thermodynamics to personal growth, the same law governs every scale — and understanding it changes how you think about success.

titleEn: On-Device Models and Mini Agents Reshape AI Deployment
excerptZh: 今天这期更像两条线同时加速
excerptEn: Two stories collide today. AI models get small enough to run locally while agents get practical enough to ship. NVIDIA 4B hybrid model, H Company computer-use agent, OpenAI tiered lineup, and Hugging Face open-source report all point to the same shift.

titleZh: AI 日报｜AI 正在离"会回答"更远，离"真能干活"更近

excerptEn: NVIDIA hits DABStep benchmark with reusable tool-generating agents. GitHub automates accessibility triage. Shopify CEO optimizes Liquid with AI. Clive Thompson on the end of programming.

titleZh: OpenClaw 为什么会爆：它不是技术奇迹，而是 agent 时代的产物
titleEn: Why OpenClaw Took Off: Not a Technical Miracle, but a Product of the Agent Era
excerptZh: 我对 OpenClaw 的判断，不是它突然比 Claude Code 这类工具多出了一项神秘技术，而是它把主动性、触达、养成和一整套已接近成熟的 agent 基础设施，压成了一个普通人也能直接使用的产品。
excerptEn: My take on OpenClaw is not that it introduced some magical capability beyond tools like Claude Code, but that it compressed initiative, reachability, habit loops, and a now-maturing agent infrastructure into a product ordinary users can actually use.

titleZh: AI 日报｜AI 正在离"会回答"更远，离"真能干活"更近

excerptEn: NVIDIA wins DeepResearch Bench with custom middleware. Rakuten cuts MTTR 50 percent with Codex. Animated sorting demos built with Claude. Streaming decision agent tutorial.

titleZh: 2026-03-11 AI 日报：OpenAI公布指令层级、提示注入
titleEn: Instruction Hierarchy, Gemini Embedding 2, and the Shift from Prompts to Execution
excerptZh: 这期只保留近 24 小时里最值得继续跟进的 6 条 AI 更新，主线集中在 AI 产品体验、检索、多模态与记忆系统、模型安全与可控性。其中 2 条补抓了原文正文，所以解释不只停留在 RSS 片段。
excerptEn: OpenAI publishes IH-Challenge for injection resistance. Gemini in Sheets nears human expert performance. Gemini Embedding 2 supports cross-modal retrieval. GitHub declares execution over prompts.

titleZh: OpenClaw 终极安装指南：从零搭建你的私有 AI 助手
titleEn: The Ultimate OpenClaw Setup Guide: Build Your Private AI Assistant
excerptZh: 完整记录 OpenClaw 的安装配置流程，涵盖 Telegram、Discord 接入、技能扩展与常见问题排查，帮你少踩坑。
excerptEn: A complete walkthrough of OpenClaw installation and configuration, covering Telegram/Discord integration, skill extensions, and common troubleshooting.

titleZh: 2026 春节档 AI 大乱斗：Qwen3.5、MiniMax M2.5、GLM-5、Kimi K2.5 深度对比，以及我对 OpenClaw 层级价值的判断
titleEn: Spring 2026 Open-Source Model Showdown: Qwen3.5, MiniMax M2.5, GLM-5, Kimi K2.5 — And Why the Orchestration Layer Matters
excerptZh: 四个模型的技术路线各有侧重，但有一个共同方向：把工具调用和 Agent 能力放在比"聪明程度"更优先的位置。这背后，是 OpenClaw 这个层级正在崛起的价值。
excerptEn: Four models, four technical approaches, one shared direction: prioritizing tool-calling and agent capabilities over raw intelligence. Behind this trend lies the rising value of the orchestration layer.
